description_long: This is a rugged, rectangular toolbox with a hard, reinforced shell featuring metallic and plastic elements. The exterior is primarily dark gray with brown and green accents, and it has a utilitarian, industrial design with visible bolts and textured panels. The lid opens upward, revealing a fitted interior with several metallic tools organized in custom slots. The top of the box displays a large, central label with technical markings and geometric patterns, while the sides show reinforced corners and subtle surface wear. The interior is lined with molded compartments to securely hold various hand tools, and the box appears to be designed for durability and portability in urban or workshop environments. The overall construction suggests a focus on protection and organization for tools in demanding settings.
description: A rugged, dark gray toolbox with brown and green accents, featuring a reinforced shell and organized interior compartments for tools.
description_view_0: Front view with the lid open, showing the organized interior and visible tools inside.
description_view_1: Side view with the lid partially open, highlighting the box's depth and the hinge mechanism.
description_view_2: Top-down view with the lid closed, displaying the main label and reinforced surface details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lid partially open, showing the box's thickness and side panel details.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed, rectangular plastic handle integrated into the top of the lid, designed for ergonomic grip and easy carrying.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two visible metallic clasp latches on the front edge, likely snap-type, providing secure closure.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular label with text and geometric patterns is visible on the top of the lid, possibly serving as a brand logo or identifier.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Interior features a single main compartment with custom-molded slots for individual tools; no removable trays or external compartments are visible.
attribute_external_labeling: Rectangular label on the top of the lid with technical markings and possible text.
